_comment: How the arena drives each rival CLI. The agent loop is the CLI's job; we just invoke it. {persona} and {prompt} are substituted at runtime. personaArg/promptArg control how each is passed (flag vs positional/stdin).

codex.note: codex CLI not yet verified installed/authed in the runner; personas folded into the prompt until a dedicated system-prompt flag is confirmed.

gemini.note: gemini CLI not yet verified installed/authed in the runner; personas folded into the prompt.

grok.note: Boltzmann. xAI Grok Build CLI (@xai-official/grok). Exact non-interactive/system-prompt flags UNVERIFIED — confirm in-runner before enabling. Needs SuperGrok sub or XAI_API_KEY.
